panels.title: Data Age
panels.description: Hours since the last Jira sync attempt and its status. Green ≤ 12 h • Yellow 12–24 h • Red > 24 h or ERROR status.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - finished_at)) / 3600.0, 1) AS "Age (h)",
  UPPER(status) AS "Status"
FROM sync_log
WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Epics with Completions
panels.description: WP- epics with at least one issue completed in selected month(s).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.key) AS value
FROM issues e
JOIN issues ci ON ci.epic_key = e.key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND ci.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND ci.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND ci.status_category = 'Done'

panels.title: Done Issues
panels.description: Issues completed in selected month(s) under WP- epics.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'

panels.title: Done SP
panels.description: Story points completed in selected month(s).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'

panels.title: Done SP (Total)
panels.description: Total story points across all WP- epic child issues (all-time reference).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'

panels.title: Done SP
panels.description: Story points completed in selected month(s).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'

panels.title: Completion %
panels.description: Done SP / Total SP across all Bose WP- workpackage epics.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points) FILTER (WHERE i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  ) AND i.status_category = 'Done'), 0)
  / NULLIF(SUM(i.story_points) FILTER (WHERE i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'), 0), 1
) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')

panels.title: Epic Progress
panels.description: Per-epic breakdown: issues and story points done vs total.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  e.key                                                                     AS "Epic",
  e.customer_project                                                        AS "Workpackage",
  e.summary                                                                 AS "Summary",
  e.status                                                                  AS "Status",
  COALESCE(e.assignee, '—')                                                 AS "Owner",
  COUNT(ci.key) FILTER (WHERE ci.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  ) AND ci.status_category = 'Done')                                        AS "Done in Qtr",
  COALESCE(SUM(ci.story_points) FILTER (WHERE ci.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  ) AND ci.status_category = 'Done'), 0)::int                               AS "SP Done Qtr",
  COALESCE(SUM(ci.story_points), 0)::int                                    AS "Total SP"
FROM issues e
LEFT JOIN issues ci
  ON  ci.epic_key    = e.key
  AND ci.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND ci.status     != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
GROUP BY e.key, e.customer_project, e.summary, e.status, e.assignee
HAVING COUNT(ci.key) FILTER (WHERE ci.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  ) AND ci.status_category = 'Done') > 0
ORDER BY e.customer_project, e.key

panels.title: Done Issues by Type
panels.description: Count of child issues grouped by status.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  i.issue_type                     AS "Type",
  COUNT(*)                         AS "Done"
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'
GROUP BY i.issue_type
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT
  COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",
  COUNT(*)                           AS "Done",
  COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0)   AS "Done SP"
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'
GROUP BY i.assignee
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Issues Completed
panels.description: Every child issue under Bose WP- workpackage epics (excluding Obsolete and Sub-tasks).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  i.key                     AS "Key",
  i.summary                 AS "Summary",
  i.issue_type              AS "Type",
  i.priority                AS "Priority",
  COALESCE(i.assignee, '—') AS "Assignee",
  i.story_points            AS "SP",
  e.customer_project        AS "Workpackage"
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'
ORDER BY e.customer_project, i.key

panels.title: Done by Workpackage
panels.description: Open vs Done issues per WP- workpackage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(e.customer_project, '—') AS "Workpackage",
  COUNT(i.key)                      AS "Done",
  COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0)  AS "Done SP"
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'
GROUP BY e.customer_project
ORDER BY SUM(i.story_points) DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Done by Team
panels.description: Open vs Done issues per Jira project (team).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  i.project_key                     AS "Team",
  COUNT(i.key)                      AS "Done",
  COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0)  AS "Done SP"
FROM issues i
JOIN issues e ON e.key = i.epic_key
WHERE e.issue_type        = 'Epic'
  AND e.customer_project LIKE '% / WP-%'
  AND e.status           != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND i.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT issue_key FROM issue_transitions
    WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') IN (${month:sqlstring})
  )
  AND i.status_category = 'Done'
GROUP BY i.project_key
ORDER BY SUM(i.story_points) DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Potential Bose Tickets
panels.description: Issues mentioning 'Bose' in title but not linked to any Epic. Candidates to be triaged into a Bose workpackage.

panels.title: Potential Bose Tickets
panels.description: Open issues mentioning 'Bose' in title with no Epic link. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, and Obsolete.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM issues
WHERE epic_key IS NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND status_category != 'Done'
  AND status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND (
    summary ILIKE '%bose%'
  )

panels.title: Potential Bose Tickets — Detail
panels.description: Open issues mentioning 'Bose' in title with no Epic link. Review and assign to a Bose workpackage epic if applicable.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  key                                AS "Key",
  summary                            AS "Summary",
  issue_type                         AS "Type",
  priority                           AS "Priority",
  status                             AS "Status",
  COALESCE(assignee, '—')           AS "Assignee",
  COALESCE(story_points::text, '—') AS "SP",
  project_key                        AS "Team",
  DATE_PART('day', NOW() - created_at)::int AS "Age (days)"
FROM issues
WHERE epic_key IS NULL
  AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
  AND status_category != 'Done'
  AND status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND (
    summary ILIKE '%bose%'
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END,
  created_at ASC

list.name: jira_url
list.label: Jira URL
list.query: SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'jira_url'

list.name: month
list.label: Month
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'Mon YYYY') AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', transitioned_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS __value FROM issue_transitions WHERE UPPER(to_status) = 'DONE' ORDER BY 2 DESC
